summary: Tested 3 new features: (1) Patch History Timeline - UI buttons verified (Apply to Live, Rollback, History), API endpoint GET /projects/:id/patch-history returns { history: [] }. (2) Post-Edit Enhancement Suggestions - verified 'What could enhance this further:' with 3 context-aware suggestions appears after self-edit. (3) Fix Response Quality - self-edit response is action-oriented with file saved confirmation.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 (Patch History Timeline): VERIFIED - CodeTab.jsx has History button (data-testid='patch-history-btn'), patch-history-panel, handleRestoreSnapshot function. live-promote.js has handlePatchHistory function returning pre-promote snapshots.

Feature 2 (Post-Edit Enhancement Suggestions): VERIFIED - message-stream.js lines 116-177 has generateSelfEditSuggestions() function that analyzes edited file path/content and returns context-aware suggestions (accessibility, SEO, performance for prompt-builder; dark mode, animations for design-system).

Feature 3 (Fix Response Quality): VERIFIED - message-stream.js lines 624-634 has rules 6-10 enforcing action-oriented behavior: 'Be ACTION-ORIENTED', 'Do NOT lecture', 'You are editing EMANATOR'S OWN CODEBASE'.
All data-testids present: apply-to-live-btn, rollback-live-btn, patch-history-btn, toggle-diff-btn, diff-view, diff-summary, core-live-controls
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified: (1) Patch History Timeline shows empty until Apply to Live is used - this is expected behavior. (2) Post-Edit Enhancement Suggestions appear as 'What could enhance this further:' with 3 items after self-edit completes. (3) Self-edit prompt rules 6-10 enforce action-oriented responses. To test Diff view: complete a self-edit, click Code tab, click on edited file, click Diff button to see line numbers and change stats.

patch_history_timeline.note: History panel shows 'No patch history yet' until Apply to Live creates snapshots

post_edit_enhancement_suggestions.format: 'What could enhance this further:' with 3 numbered suggestions
example_suggestions: Add accessibility guidelines — ensure generated sites include ARIA labels and proper heading hierarchy
Add SEO best practices — meta tags, semantic HTML, and structured data rules
Add performance rules — lazy loading, code splitting hints, image optimization

rules_implemented: Rule 6: Be ACTION-ORIENTED. Do NOT explain what you 'would' do — just DO it.
Rule 7: Do NOT lecture about approaches, strategies, or steps.
Rule 8: You are editing EMANATOR'S OWN CODEBASE — not a user's website project.
Rule 9: Never suggest editing API routes, database logic, or authentication flows.
Rule 10: After applying patches, briefly note what changed and suggest 1-2 related improvements.
